economic_notes: Nation has interests in hydroelectric power (25% Kwagis Power LP - 41.5MW run of river), sand and gravel (12% Orca Sand & Gravel LP), logging (Atli Resources LP - 20yr forest license), aquaculture (Kuterra LP - ceased operations 2020, now leased), fishing licences (Mama'omas LP), forestry (49.5% Danyas Forest Products LP), real estate (NBDC Real Estate LP), and driving school (North Island Driving School Society). Receives $0.06/tonne community benefit from Orca Sand and Gravel.
notes: Prior period restatement in 2023 comparatives: accounts payable understated by $790,764 and capital assets understated by $224,273 due to unrecognized contract expenses and misclassified work-in-progress. 12 entities accounted for under modified equity method as GBEs. 5 entities fully consolidated. ISC funding excludes FNHA ($5,799,486) and DFO ($3,947,311) which are separate government transfers. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + DFO + Other Federal Grants + CMHC + NVIAETS = 12,827,897 + 5,715,213 + 5,799,486 + 3,947,311 + 1,650,000 + 279,931 + 165,592 + 527175 + 138034 + 127393 + 169207 = approximately 30,147,029. Auditor located in Qualicum Beach, BC. Large accumulated surplus of $116M with strong net financial assets of $101M. Defined contribution pension plan with $208,640 employer contributions.
